ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "entrez_gene_id" INTEGER /* Entrez Gene ID */,
  "hgnc_id" INTEGER /* HUGO Gene Nomenclature Committee ID */,
  "ensembl_gene_id" TEXT /* Ensembl Gene ID */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomal_locations" (
  "chromosomal_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosomal location */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "chr" TEXT /* Chromosome number */,
  "chr_band" TEXT /* Chromosomal band */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand information (+ or -) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chromosomal location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chromosomal location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosomal_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chromosomal_locations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "somatic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mutation is somatic */,
  "germline" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mutation is germline */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., missense, nonsense, frameshift) */,
  "amino_acid_change" TEXT /* Amino acid change in the protein sequence */,
  "nucleotide_change" TEXT /* Nucleotide change in the DNA sequence */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation in the population */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the mutation (e.g., pathogenic, benign) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mutation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mutation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "tumour_type_somatic" TEXT /* Tumor type for somatic mutations */,
  "tumour_type_germline" TEXT /* Tumor type for germline mutations */,
  "cancer_syndrome" TEXT /* Cancer syndrome */,
  "tumor_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the tumor */,
  "tumor_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tumor */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the cancer type */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Risk factors associated with the cancer type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cancer type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cancer type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_types_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_genetics" (
  "molecular_genetics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular genetics entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Tissue type */,
  "molecular_genetics" TEXT /* Molecular genetics data */,
  "mutation_types" TEXT /* Mutation types */,
  "translocation_partner" TEXT /* Translocation partner */,
  "other_germline_mut" TEXT /* Other germline mutations */,
  "other_syndrome" TEXT /* Other syndromes */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the gene */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the gene in the tissue type */,
  "functional_impact" TEXT /* Functional impact of the mutation */,
  "pathway" TEXT /* Pathway(s) the gene is involved in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the molecular genetics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the molecular genetics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecular_genetics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_genetics_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
